name: Star Navigation Systems Group Ltd.
summary: Star Navigation Systems Group Ltd. develops, markets, and promotes in-flight safety monitoring systems (ISMS) worldwide. The company provides STAR-ISMS, an aircraft computer that combines in-flight data monitoring, diagnostics, and data analysis with real time connections between the aircraft and the ground using real-time satellite transmission; and STAR A.D.S. that offers real-time monitoring, data analysis, aircraft health and flight operation status, and real-time position information. It also offers STAR-T.T.T. for small aircrafts and land vehicles; V-trk, a worldwide tracker; and STAR-M.M.I., that repairs, performs qualification tests on, and supports onboard LCD flat screen displays for fixed wing aircraft and helicopters for both civilian and military applications. Star Navigation Systems Group Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Brampton, Canada.
